---
title: "AI Crawler Observatory · Italy"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: [cosmo, theme.scss]
    orientation: rows
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/mxdangelo/aicrawl-census
---

```{python}
#| include: false
import json
import pandas as pd
import charts

df = pd.read_parquet("data/policy_facts.parquet")
sig = pd.read_parquet("data/sector_signals.parquet")
meta = json.load(open("data/meta.json", encoding="utf-8"))

n_domains = int(sig["n_domains"].sum())
n_crawlers = len(meta["crawlers"])
snapshot = meta["snapshots"][-1]
gpt_blocked = int(df[(df.crawler == "GPTBot") & (df.verdict == "blocked")
                     & (df.source == "specific")]["n_domains"].sum())
gpt_pct = gpt_blocked / n_domains
```

## Row {height="18%"}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Domains surveyed"
dict(icon="globe2", color="primary", value=n_domains)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "AI crawlers tracked"
dict(icon="robot", color="light", value=n_crawlers)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Specifically block GPTBot"
dict(icon="shield-lock", color="light", value=f"{gpt_pct:.1%}")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Latest snapshot"
dict(icon="calendar3", color="light", value=snapshot)
```

## Row

```{python}
#| title: "Verdict mix by crawler — slice by sector and source"
charts.verdict_by_crawler(df)
```
